channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon says stablecoin issuers paying interest should be regulated as banks
item.description: Dimon argued stablecoin issuers paying interest should meet bank standards as talks continue in Washington about the CLARITY Act....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Microsoft: Hackers abuse OAuth error flows to spread malware
item.description: Hackers are abusing the legitimate OAuth redirection mechanism to bypass phishing protections in email and browsers to take users to malicious pages. [...]...
